case_title: ENRIQUE MORENO VS. MAKSIM KOUZNETSOV ET AL

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORENO, ENRIQUE ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS
MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-27-2018 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-29-2019 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-11-2019 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JUN-11-2019 AT 10:30 AM PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68608(B). THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORENO, ENRIQUE AS TO DEFENDANT KOUZNETSOV, MAKSIM DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-18-2018 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-16-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-26-2018

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST ENRIQUE MORENO FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JAN-29-2019, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-14-2019. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. [VACATED PER COURT'S ORAL ORDER AT THE 6-11-19 OSC HEARING.]

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-28-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUL-18-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-11-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective in light of the history of failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. All previously imposed sanctions against the plaintiff are vacated. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-11-2019 Continued To Jun-11-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to Jun-11-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. This case is subject to dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b) if there is no appearance on the next hearing date and compliance. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-30-2019 Continued To Apr-09-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to Apr-09-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-28-2018 Continued To Jan-29-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Appearance by Enrique Moreno as self represented Plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set Jan-29-2019 at 10:30 AM in Dept. 610. JUDGE TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk JLee. Proceedings not reported. (610)
